title: Cobblemon PC Resizer
description: Resize anyone's Cobblemon PC with a single command.
body:
Works on both 1.4, 1.5 and 1.6 Cobblemon

## Permission:
- `pcresizer.admin` or OP

## Commands:
- `/pcresize checksize <playername>`: Check player PC size
- `/pcresize resize <playername> <newsize>`: Resize player's PC box
- `/pcresize addbox <playername> <size>`: Add specific amount of boxes to a player's PC store

## Note
Player may need to reconnect to resync their PC boxes count, just visually. Adding boxes does not appear to have any issues.
